title: Polyscias rufosepala
intro: Polyscias rufosepala, also known as the Fiji fern tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Polyscias rufosepala include flavonoids, lignans, and other phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Polyscias rufosepala is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions.
